task.label: Require verification of identity of customer and beneficial owner
Verify identity of customer and beneficial owner

conditions.condition: before the establishment of a business relationship or the carrying out of the transaction

exception.description: If Member States allow verification during the establishment of a business relationship
If Member States allow the opening of an account with adequate safeguards

task.label: Allow verification of identity to be completed during establishment of business relationship

conditions.condition: if necessary so as not to interrupt the normal conduct of business and where there is little risk of money laundering or terrorist financing
as soon as practicable after initial contact in situations where verification is completed during the establishment of a business relationship

provided that there are adequate safeguards in place to ensure that transactions are not carried out by the customer or on its behalf until full compliance with customer due diligence requirements is obtained

task.label: Ensure that transactions are not carried out by the customer

conditions.condition: until full compliance with the customer due diligence requirements is obtained
until full compliance with the customer due diligence requirements is obtained

task.label: Require prohibition of transactions and termination of relationship

conditions.condition: where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements

task.label: Carry out a transaction through a bank account

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements
where unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements
where unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements
where unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements

task.label: Consider making a suspicious transaction report to the FIU

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements

task.label: Apply the first subparagraph to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors

conditions.condition: to the strict extent that those persons ascertain the legal position of their client, or perform the task of defending or representing that client in, or concerning, judicial proceedings, including providing advice on instituting or avoiding such proceedings

task.label: Require that obliged entities apply customer due diligence measures
Apply customer due diligence measures to new customers
Apply customer due diligence measures to existing customers

conditions.condition: at appropriate times on a risk-sensitive basis, including at times when the relevant circumstances of a customer change
